Released: 02 July 2026

Advanced Storage Pack 1.7.0 introduces Windows support for the Bluefin TAM.

## New Features

<table class="table w-100"><thead><tr><th>Description</th><th width="10%">Addresses</th></tr></thead><tbody>
<tr><td><details><summary>Bluefin - Added Windows installer support</summary><hr/><p>Bluefin is now available on Windows for the first time. A graphical setup wizard installs Bluefin into an existing PostgreSQL or EDB Postgres Advanced Server installation on Windows. Autocluster and Refdata remain Linux-only.</p>
</details></td><td>ASP-273</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
